Class ParameterFittingReport

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ParameterFittingReport
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ParameterFittingReport extends Object implements Serializable
Lightweight serializable report for a completed parameter fitting study.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • ParameterFittingReport

      public ParameterFittingReport(ParameterFittingStudy study)
      Creates a fitting report from a completed study.
      Parameters:
      study - completed parameter fitting study
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the study has not been run

  • Method Details

    • toJson

      public String toJson() throws IOException
      Serializes this report as JSON.
      Returns:
      pretty-printed JSON report
      Throws:
      IOException - if serialization fails

    • toMarkdown

      public String toMarkdown()
      Renders this report as a compact Markdown summary.
      Returns:
      Markdown report

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts the report to a map suitable for JSON serialization.
      Returns:
      report map
